evals.prompt: Run consistency analysis on apps/shop/docs/versions/2.0.0/requirements.md before we generate tasks.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads requirements, runs checks, writes consistency-report.md, states proceed/stop decision.

evals.prompt: I edited requirements — Feature 003 references table orders but data model only lists users.
evals.expected_output: Agent flags blocker for missing entity in data model, does not edit requirements file.

evals.prompt: Requirements look good — any blockers for task generation?
evals.expected_output: Agent performs full check matrix; if 100% pass explains Gate 3 can be skipped.
